* Vector2
#+begin_src til
struct Vector2 {
    mut x : F32
    mut y : F32
namespace:
    func clone(self: Vector2) returns Vector2
    func delete(own self: Vector2, shallow call_free: Bool)
    func hash(self: Vector2, hasher: HashFn) returns shallow U64
    func size() returns shallow U32
}
#+end_src
